title: taraxacum repandum
intro: Taraxacum repandum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum repandum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and help manage symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Taraxacum repandum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some parts of the world, particularly in salads and as a vegetable.
